channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree oitsude 31a Morgan Road requires pruning., 16th April
item.description:
The basal growth and shape of this damaged tree is causing difficulty for drivers' sightlines at the junction of Morgan Road and Howard Road. Could this tree please be inspected and pruned. The top of the tree appears damaged. Thank you. Cllr Alisa Igoe

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Howard Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on the pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Litter all over the pavement, in front of various shops
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 16th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Saunders Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2ft wide pot hole, 16th April
item.description:
This pot hole has been badly repaired again and again and has now gone again. There are stones and rocks in the hole that are flying up when driven over and damaging g parked cars

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clifton Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue squiggly spray paint on ramp external wall, 16th April
item.description:
On the northern side of the Lesnes Abbey bridge, there's a blue squiggly line of graffiti. It is on the western side of the ramp's wall on the white surface. See photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several humongous potholes, 16th April
item.description:
Several massive pot holes along a short stretch of road Getting larger and causing multiple problems.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead cat in road, 16th April
item.description:
Dead cat in road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pot hole and massive rocks, 16th April
item.description:
Huge pot hole getting bigger. Very large rocks flying up and rolling around. Trip hazard and cars swerving to avoid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Orchard Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small fox hit by car at commercial way bus stop, 16th April
item.description:
Saw it at 6am this morning looks quite fresh, disturbing the traffic as cars are driving around it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 50, Peckham Hill Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on corner of Lavender and Malvern, 16th April
item.description:
Left overnight. The foxes have already been at the food waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lavender Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bikes, 16th April
item.description:
At least 10 bikes and more not pictured outside Sainsbury's petrol station

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Bugsby's Way, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40-44 fortune green, 16th April
item.description:
Trench and potholes on both sides of road crating hazards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Fortune Green Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish,back of westbere house, 16th April

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221, High Street, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Flytip roberts close, 16th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Zig zag line by pole2 been patched up borough to repaint lines, 16th April
item.description:
Zig zag line by pole2 been patched up borough to repaint lines

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 16th April
item.description:
Been dumped months and not moved flat tire now and very dusty MOT running out in May. Maybe stolen
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing light stuck, 16th April
item.description:
One of the Pedestrian crossing lights is stuck as once the lights go back to red button is pressed with noone around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface in poor condition here - please inspect, 16th April
item.description:
A previous report in February here was closed off and not resolved. I was advised to log a new report. Please attend and inspect the road surface here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 16th April
item.description:
Dumped car sorned on a public road no road tax no mot time to remove it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
